commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=20cf417edf753f9a9f61a529311bcabbd9cc8cb3)
commands.review_summary:
The PR consolidates repeated record, string, nullable-string, non-empty-string, finite-number, numeric-string, and Talk event metric coercion helpers across core, gateway, agents, channels, SDK, and bundled plugin code.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a user bug; the blocking review concern is source-reproducible from the PR diff and current SDK docs.
commands.review_followup: Maintainer review is needed for the Plugin SDK public surface decision and the dirty branch state; this is not a safe autonomous cleanup lane as submitted.

target.title: refactor: reuse shared coercion helpers
target.body:
## Summary

- Share Talk event payload/metric extraction between logging and diagnostics.
- Reuse shared record, string, nullable-string, non-empty-string, finite-number, and numeric-string coercion helpers across core, SDK, gateway, agents, auto-reply, gateway chat display, Talk runtime, logging, plugin metadata, ACP, cron, chat, config, auth-profile, doctor, trajectory, TTS, media, CLI, runtime routing, Tailscale, health checks, plugin SDK stream and task runtimes, tool-loop detection, inbound media normalization, interactive payloads, Codex command, conversation, and app-server paths, QA Lab, Feishu, Google, Google Meet, active-memory, Deepgram, opencode, skill-workshop, Canvas, Discord, Telegram, Slack monitor, Discord inbound delivery, Ollama, Amazon Bedrock, and bundled plugin code instead of repeating local guards.
- Export plugin-safe primitive coercion helpers from `openclaw/plugin-sdk/string-coerce-runtime` and add terse AGENTS rules for low-churn readability patterns.

## Verification

- pnpm test src/talk/logging.test.ts src/talk/diagnostics.test.ts packages/sdk/src/index.test.ts src/agents/openclaw-tools.subagents.sessions-spawn-applies-thinking-default.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/agent-wait-dedupe.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/artifacts.test.ts
- pnpm test src/logging/diagnostic-support-export.test.ts src/logging/diagnostic-support-bundle.test.ts src/plugins/installed-plugin-index.test.ts src/plugins/installed-plugin-index-records.test.ts src/plugins/manifest-registry-installed.test.ts src/plugins/provider-install-catalog.test.ts src/gateway/cli-session-history.test.ts src/commitments/extraction.test.ts src/agents/auth-profiles/state-observation.test.ts
- pnpm test src/agents/code-mode.test.ts src/cron/store.test.ts src/config/redact-snapshot.test.ts src/plugin-sdk/migration-runtime.test.ts src/plugin-sdk/qa-channel-protocol.test.ts src/gateway/mcp-http.test.ts src/agents/openclaw-gateway-tool.test.ts src/agents/auth-profiles/persisted-boundary.test.ts src/agents/auth-profiles/state-observation.test.ts src/plugins/bundled-sources.test.ts src/plugins/plugin-metadata-snapshot.memo.test.ts src/plugins/tools.optional.test.ts src/commitments/store.test.ts src/trajectory/cleanup.test.ts src/tts/status-config.test.ts
- pnpm test src/auto-reply/heartbeat-filter.test.ts src/agents/tools/heartbeat-response-tool.test.ts src/agents/harness/tool-result-middleware.test.ts src/agents/cli-runner.spawn.test.ts src/commitments/store.test.ts src/commitments/extraction.test.ts src/shared/device-auth-store.test.ts src/infra/device-auth-store.test.ts src/trajectory/cleanup.test.ts src/trajectory/export.test.ts src/commands/doctor-auth-flat-profiles.test.ts src/commands/doctor-auth-oauth-sidecar.test.ts src/commands/export-trajectory.test.ts src/plugins/plugin-metadata-snapshot.memo.test.ts src/plugins/bundled-plugin-metadata.test.ts src/channels/bundled-channel-catalog-read.test.ts src/tts/tts-config.test.ts
- pnpm test src/agents/model-auth-env.provider-aliases.test.ts src/agents/model-auth.workspace-plugin.test.ts src/agents/openai-transport-stream.test.ts src/agents/tool-loop-detection.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/transcript-file-state.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/compaction-duplicate-user-messages.test.ts src/commands/doctor-session-state-providers.test.ts src/commands/doctor/shared/release-configured-plugin-installs.test.ts src/commands/migrate.test.ts src/infra/package-json.test.ts src/infra/voicewake-routing.test.ts src/media-understanding/media-understanding-misc.test.ts src/gateway/method-scopes.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/artifacts.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/agents-mutate.test.ts

- pnpm test src/shared/number-coercion.test.ts
- pnpm test extensions/qa-lab/src/jsonl-replay.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/tool-coverage-report.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/gateway-log-sentinel.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/gateway-child.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/suite-runtime-agent-session.test.ts extensions/feishu/src/monitor.bot-menu.test.ts extensions/feishu/src/send.test.ts extensions/feishu/src/outbound.test.ts extensions/feishu/src/setup-surface.test.ts extensions/google-meet/src/config-compat.test.ts extensions/google-meet/node-host.test.ts extensions/google/provider-policy-api.test.ts

- pnpm test extensions/canvas/src/config.test.ts extensions/discord/src/security-audit.test.ts extensions/discord/src/audit.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/security-audit.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/audit.test.ts extensions/telegram/channel-config-api.test.ts
- pnpm test extensions/google-meet/src/config-compat.test.ts extensions/discord/src/actions/handle-action.test.ts extensions/discord/src/outbound-adapter.test.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.test.ts extensions/slack/src/monitor/events/messages.test.ts extensions/slack/src/monitor/message-handler/prepare.test.ts extensions/slack/src/monitor/provider.interop.test.ts extensions/slack/src/monitor/provider.reconnect.test.ts extensions/slack/src/monitor/provider.allowlist.test.ts

- pnpm test src/agents/pi-embedded-subscribe.tools.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-subscribe.handlers.tools.test.ts src/agents/code-mode.test.ts src/flows/bundled-health-checks.test.ts src/infra/event-session-routing.test.ts src/infra/tailscale.test.ts src/gateway/talk-handoff.test.ts src/gateway/server-tailscale.test.ts

- pnpm test extensions/codex/src/app-server/dynamic-tools.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/openclaw-owned-tool-runtime-contract.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/native-subagent-monitor.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/transcript-mirror.test.ts
- pnpm test extensions/codex/src/app-server/compact.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/app-inventory-cache.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/image-payload-sanitizer.test.ts extensions/codex/src/node-cli-sessions.test.ts extensions/codex/src/migration/provider.test.ts
- pnpm test extensions/migrate-claude/provider.test.ts extensions/migrate-hermes/provider.test.ts extensions/migrate-hermes/config.test.ts extensions/migrate-hermes/files-and-skills.test.ts extensions/migrate-hermes/model.apply.test.ts extensions/migrate-hermes/model.plan.test.ts extensions/migrate-hermes/provider.secret-failure.test.ts extensions/migrate-hermes/secrets.test.ts extensions/ollama/src/stream.test.ts extensions/ollama/src/stream-runtime.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/runtime-parity.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/scenario-flow-runner.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/suite-runtime-gateway.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/live-transports/telegram/telegram-live.runtime.test.ts extensions/qa-matrix/src/runners/contract/runtime.test.ts extensions/qa-matrix/src/runners/contract/scenarios.test.ts extensions/voice-call/src/deep-merge.test.ts
- pnpm test extensions/feishu/src/monitor.bot-menu.test.ts extensions/feishu/src/bot.test.ts src/tts/tts-config.test.ts src/infra/voicewake-routing.test.ts
- node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false
- env -u OPENCLAW_TESTBOX pnpm check:changed
- pnpm build
- git diff --check
- .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Repeated boundary coercion and Talk event metric extraction are consolidated without changing SDK run/session parsing, agent yield/thinking handling, command-turn parsing, chat display projection, Talk transport normalization, OpenAI transport parsing, gateway wait/artifact/config/agent handling, diagnostic redaction/export, plugin metadata parsing, plugin SDK sanitization, ACP runtime controls, chat projection, cron store/schedule identity, config redaction/defaulting, auth-profile/env persistence, doctor repair parsing, migration selection, trajectory export/cleanup, TTS status parsing, media-understanding auth detection, code-mode behavior, session transcript repair, message terminal result detection, bundled provider parsing, runtime routing, Tailscale identity parsing, bundled health registration, PI embedded tool error shaping, Talk handoff client id normalization, interactive payload normalization, Codex command argument normalization, Codex conversation binding parsing, Codex conversation turn collection, Codex native asset scanning, Codex route warning parsing, plugin SDK plain-text tool-call promotion, agent harness task runtime scope parsing, tool-loop run-id scoping, inbound media payload normalization, Codex dynamic-tool telemetry parsing, Codex native subagent monitor option parsing, Codex transcript mirror sender normalization, Codex app inventory, compaction, image payload, CLI session, and migration config parsing, QA Lab replay/coverage/gateway/runtime parity/flow parsing, QA Matrix scenario config parsing, Hermes/Claude migration helper parsing, voice-call deep-merge config parsing, TTS config merge parsing, voicewake route target parsing, Feishu send/outbound/setup/monitor parsing, Google Meet config/setup/host parsing, Google policy/ADC/web-search parsing, active-memory config/routing parsing, Deepgram audio response parsing, opencode media payload stripping, skill-workshop config/proposal parsing, Canvas config parsing, Discord security audit parsing, Telegram secret/security audit parsing, Discord inbound delivery metadata parsing, Slack message-change/prepare/provider self-filter parsing, Slack rich-text content parsing, Discord hydration fallback parsing, Ollama discovery/stream schema parsing, Amazon Bedrock embedding response parsing, Canvas config migration parsing, or Talk observability payloads.
Real environment tested: Local macOS checkout on Node/pnpm repo defaults.

Observed result after fix: The PR is now 262 files, +579/-1492, net -913 LOC while keeping targeted behavior and repository gates green locally.
What was not tested: Live provider or cross-platform E2E scenarios; this is a local refactor and AGENTS guidance change.

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
